texts.title: 描述图片内容
paragraphs: 妈妈在厨房里准备晚餐，小女孩看见了，就主动上前去帮忙。她先把食物端到餐桌上，再摆碗筷，然后等着和家人一起吃晚餐。

audioTimestamps.text: 口试练习：做家务
audioTimestamps.english: Oral Practice: Doing Housework

audioTimestamps.text: 妈妈在厨房里准备晚餐，
audioTimestamps.english: Mom is in the kitchen preparing dinner,

audioTimestamps.text: 小女孩看见了，就主动上前去帮忙。
audioTimestamps.english: the little girl saw this and took the initiative to go help.

audioTimestamps.text: 她先把食物端到餐桌上，
audioTimestamps.english: She first carried the food to the dining table,

audioTimestamps.text: 再摆碗筷，
audioTimestamps.english: then set out the bowls and chopsticks,

audioTimestamps.text: 然后等着和家人一起吃晚餐。
audioTimestamps.english: then waited to eat dinner together with the family.

texts.title: 看法
paragraphs: 我认为小女孩主动帮助父母做家务的行为是值得我们学习和称赞的。因为父母工作很忙，我们应该多帮他们做家务，减轻他们的负担，做一个乖巧懂事的孩子。如果我是图片中的小女孩，我也会像她一样帮忙做家务。

audioTimestamps.text: 看了这一幕，我感到很高兴。
audioTimestamps.english: Seeing this scene, I feel very happy.

audioTimestamps.text: 我认为小女孩主动帮助父母做家务的行为
audioTimestamps.english: I think the girl's behavior of proactively helping her parents do housework

audioTimestamps.text: 是值得我们学习和称赞的。
audioTimestamps.english: is worthy of our learning and praise.

audioTimestamps.text: 因为父母工作很忙，
audioTimestamps.english: Because parents are very busy with work,

audioTimestamps.text: 我们应该多帮他们做家务，
audioTimestamps.english: we should help them more with housework,

audioTimestamps.text: 减轻他们的负担，
audioTimestamps.english: lighten their burden,

audioTimestamps.text: 做一个乖巧懂事的孩子。
audioTimestamps.english: and be a well-behaved and sensible child.

audioTimestamps.text: 如果我是图片中的小女孩，
audioTimestamps.english: If I were the little girl in the picture,

audioTimestamps.text: 我也会像她一样帮忙做家务。
audioTimestamps.english: I would also help with housework like her.

texts.title: 会话练习
paragraphs: 经历类问题：你有没有帮父母做过家务？说说你的经历。
我有帮父母做过家务。记得一个星期天，我们全家总动员一起分担家务。
妈妈准备早餐和午餐，还要熨衣服。爸爸负责洗碗和拖地。我和弟弟虽然年纪小，但是也帮忙做一些简单的家务。
比如吃饭前我负责摆好碗碟。吃饱之后我就把桌子抹干净。我还帮妈妈把洗衣机里洗好的衣服晾起来。整理好自己的书包，并把校鞋洗干净。
弟弟把自己的床收拾得整整齐齐的，还帮忙把晒干的衣服折好。
做家务让我养成了好的生活习惯，提高了自理能力，也让我明白了父母的辛苦。以后我会经常帮父母做家务，不让他们那么辛苦。

audioTimestamps.text: 经历类问题：
audioTimestamps.english: Experience-type question:

audioTimestamps.text: 你有没有帮父母做过家务？
audioTimestamps.english: Have you ever helped your parents do housework?

audioTimestamps.text: 说说你的经历。
audioTimestamps.english: Talk about your experience.

audioTimestamps.text: 我有帮父母做过家务。
audioTimestamps.english: I have helped my parents do housework.

audioTimestamps.text: 记得一个星期天，
audioTimestamps.english: I remember one Sunday,

audioTimestamps.text: 我们全家总动员一起分担家务。
audioTimestamps.english: our whole family mobilized to share the housework.

audioTimestamps.text: 妈妈准备早餐和午餐，
audioTimestamps.english: Mom prepared breakfast and lunch,

audioTimestamps.text: 还要熨衣服。
audioTimestamps.english: and also ironed clothes.

audioTimestamps.text: 爸爸负责洗碗和拖地。
audioTimestamps.english: Dad was responsible for washing dishes and mopping the floor.

audioTimestamps.text: 我和弟弟虽然年纪小，
audioTimestamps.english: Although my younger brother and I are young,

audioTimestamps.text: 但是也帮忙做一些简单的家务。
audioTimestamps.english: we also helped with some simple housework.

audioTimestamps.text: 比如吃饭前我负责摆好碗碟。
audioTimestamps.english: For example, before meals I was responsible for setting out bowls and plates.

audioTimestamps.text: 吃饱之后我就把桌子抹干净。
audioTimestamps.english: After eating, I would wipe the table clean.

audioTimestamps.text: 我还帮妈妈把洗衣机里洗好的衣服晾起来。
audioTimestamps.english: I also helped Mom hang up the clothes from the washing machine.

audioTimestamps.text: 整理好自己的书包，
audioTimestamps.english: I organized my school bag,

audioTimestamps.text: 并把校鞋洗干净。
audioTimestamps.english: and washed my school shoes clean.

audioTimestamps.text: 弟弟把自己的床收拾得整整齐齐的，
audioTimestamps.english: My brother tidied his bed neatly,

audioTimestamps.text: 还帮忙把晒干的衣服折好。
audioTimestamps.english: and also helped fold the dried clothes.

audioTimestamps.text: 做家务让我养成了好的生活习惯，
audioTimestamps.english: Doing housework helped me develop good living habits,

audioTimestamps.text: 提高了自理能力，
audioTimestamps.english: improved my ability to take care of myself,

audioTimestamps.text: 也让我明白了父母的辛苦。
audioTimestamps.english: and also made me understand my parents' hard work.

audioTimestamps.text: 以后我会经常帮父母做家务，
audioTimestamps.english: In the future, I will often help my parents do housework,

audioTimestamps.text: 不让他们那么辛苦。
audioTimestamps.english: so they won't be so tired.
